initiatives.name: Trans CLoset Montana
initiatives.description: A trans-run mutual aid based in Bozeman, MT offering FREE gender-affirming clothing, shoes, and undergarments to trans+ folks across Montana!

initiatives.name: Bozeman Tenants United
initiatives.description: We are building a multi-racial, intergenerational movement of tenants to win safe, dignified and truly affordable housing for all.

initiatives.name: Pride House 406
initiatives.description: An affirming, youth-centered & youth-empowered space that allows LGBTQIA+ kids to grow and thrive in a supportive & compassionate environment.
